name: semantic-memory
description: Local-first persistent memory, receipt-backed compaction, and claim/evidence provenance for Claude Code: auto-recall hooks (warm HTTP), project-scoped session priming, pre-compact capture, codebase ingestion, a memory-keeper subagent, and skills to capture/curate/explore/sync — over semantic-memory-mcp (55+ sm_* tools), context-governor (4 cg_* tools), and claim-ledger (5 cl_* tools).
